listen.description: Listen address for the HTTP API (e.g. ":8080" or "127.0.0.1:8080").

APIConfig.description: APIConfig configures the HTTP API server.

neighbors.description: List of BGP neighbors (peers) to establish sessions with.

BGPConfig.description: BGPConfig defines global BGP parameters and neighbors.

interval.description: Interval between consecutive health checks. Default: 5s.

timeout.description: Maximum time to wait for a check to complete; must be less than interval. Default: 2s.

rise.description: Number of consecutive successes required to mark healthy (HAProxy-style). Default: 3.

fall.description: Number of consecutive failures required to mark unhealthy (HAProxy-style). Default: 3.

http.description: HTTP check configuration (required when type is "http").

dns.description: DNS check configuration (required when type is "dns").

ping.description: Ping (ICMP) check configuration (required when type is "ping").

CheckConfig.description: CheckConfig defines health check type, scheduling, and type-specific parameters.

names.description: DNS names to query. All must resolve successfully for the check to pass.

resolver.description: DNS resolver address (ip or ip:port). Defaults to VIP prefix IP.

port.description: DNS resolver port (used when resolver is an IP without port). Default: 53.

DNSCheckConfig.description: DNSCheckConfig defines a DNS health check.

Duration.description: Duration wraps time.Duration for YAML/TOML/JSON unmarshaling from strings like "1s", "500ms".

url.description: URL to check. Can be a full URL (https://example.com/healthz) or a path (/healthz). When a full URL is given, proto and Host header are derived from it.

proto.description: Protocol override. Derived from full URL if not set. Default: http.

host.description: Host to connect to and send in the Host header. Defaults to VIP prefix IP for /32 or /128 prefixes.

port.description: Port override. Defaults to 80 for http, 443 for https.

response_codes.description: List of acceptable HTTP response status codes. Default: [200].

response_text.description: Exact string that must be present in the response body.

response_regex.description: Regular expression that must match the response body.

response_jq.description: JQ expression evaluated against the JSON response body; check passes when the result is "true".

tls_insecure.description: Skip TLS certificate verification. Mutually exclusive with tls_ca_cert.

tls_ca_cert.description: Path to a PEM-encoded CA certificate file for TLS verification. Mutually exclusive with tls_insecure.

headers.description: Additional HTTP headers to send with the check request.

HTTPCheckConfig.description: HTTPCheckConfig defines an HTTP health check.

as_path_prepend.description: Number of times to prepend the local ASN to the AS_PATH. Default: 6.

communities.description: BGP communities to attach to pessimized route announcements (e.g. "65535:666").

LowerPriorityConfig.description: LowerPriorityConfig defines BGP attributes for pessimized announcements.

name.description: Human-readable name for this peer (used in logs and metrics).

address.description: IPv4 address of the BGP peer.

required.description: If true, all VIPs require this peer to be established. Default: false.

port.description: TCP port for the BGP session. Default: 179.

passive.description: Wait for the peer to initiate the connection instead of connecting actively.

dst_ip.description: Destination IP address to ping. Defaults to VIP prefix IP.

src_ip.description: Source IP address for outgoing ICMP packets.

count.description: Number of ICMP echo requests to send per check cycle. Default: 1.

interval.description: Interval between individual ICMP packets within a check cycle.

max_loss_ratio.description: Maximum acceptable packet loss ratio (0.0–1.0). Default: 0 (no loss allowed).

PingCheckConfig.description: PingCheckConfig defines an ICMP ping health check.

fail_action.description: Action to take when the health check fails: withdraw the route entirely, or lower its BGP priority.

lower_priority.description: Configuration for the lower_priority fail action.

PolicyConfig.description: PolicyConfig defines how VIP state changes on check failure.

asn.description: Autonomous System Number for this router (1–4294967295).

router_id.description: BGP Router ID in dotted-quad notation (e.g. 10.0.0.1).

local_address.description: Local address to bind BGP sessions. If empty, the OS selects the source address.

name.description: Human-readable name for this VIP (used in logs and metrics).

check.description: Health check configuration for this VIP.

policy.description: Policy controlling how BGP announcements react to check failures.

VIPConfig.description: VIPConfig defines a Virtual IP with its health check and policy.

api.description: HTTP API server configuration (healthz, metrics, status).

bgp.description: BGP session parameters and neighbor definitions.

vips.description: List of Virtual IPs to announce via BGP, each with a health check.

title: pathosd configuration
description: Configuration schema for pathosd — health-aware BGP VIP announcer
